task_objective: Optimize initial startup latency of the SDH-Ludusavi QAM panel when opened for the first time by removing slow subprocess-querying RPCs (getVersions and getLudusaviCommandCall) from the critical loading path.
design_decisions: Refactor frontend loadInitial sequence to only await getSettings() before resolving the UI loading spinner, deferring getVersions() and getLudusaviCommandCall() asynchronously in the background.
Initialize versions state with 'Loading...' placeholders, transitioning to real values upon successful resolution or falling back to 'Unknown' or specific error message upon RpcStatus/rejection.
Offload slow backend diagnostics checks (get_diagnostics) to a daemon thread during adapter lazy initialization to ensure RPC commands are non-blocking.
results: All checks passed: typechecks (pnpm & ty), formatting/lints (ruff), and the full 232-test pytest suite.
